THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANH, KIEN THI DBA HO HO PASTRIES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 309 SIXTH AVE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $3,400.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,400.00, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF SHALL RECOVER $56.66 PER DAY IN DAILY RENTAL DAMAGES FROM 1/1/01 TO THE DATE OF JUDGMENT. PLTF IS AWARDED COSTS OF SUIT AND REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES.
